title: pteris vittata subsp. longifolia
intro: Pteris vittata subsp. longifolia, also known as the long-leaved ladder fern, is a subspecies of the Pteris vittata fern, a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Pteris vittata subsp. longifolia lie in its high concentration of pterostilbene, a polyphenol compound with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant is used for its health benefits, including its ability to protect against liver damage, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Pteris vittata subsp. longifolia is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be found in capsule or powder form as a dietary supplement.
